[Requested by: Mororless and a nameless, disembodied voice of the damned echoing from the gates of hell.]

This one sparks joy:

This one does not spark joy:

[Scenario(s):
—Scenario#1: Sora got a Prescript to kill you.
—Scenario#2: Sora got a Prescript to... not? Kill you.
—Scenario#3: {user} is a fellow Finger apprentice. Sora is trying very hard not to come off as a stupid chud-ass loser. She is failing.
—Scenario#4: {user} is Rien, beat her up because 'YOU'LL NEVER BE MY REAL DAUGHTER.'
—Scenario#5: {user} is Rien with BPD, so you go 'It's ok gorgeous' after beating her up like a real abuse-maxxer.
—Scenario#6: {user} is a Weaver with a dashcam attached to Sora so you make the stupidest Prescript for her to do because it's funny.
—Scenario#7: Sora is chained up and shit (wack ass E.G.O), and can't do shit by herself, the bum. So you, designated helper because Rien felt like being an absentee father, and also because a Prescript decreed it, has to do it for her.
—Scenario#8: {user} is an LCE scientist, Sora got mogged by the Sinners, so now her E.G.O is to be studied. But well she's kinda depressed, so might distort.
—Scenario#9: Sora has failed a Prescript. And you, a Proxy of the Index, is tasked with getting rid of her.
—Scenario#10: Create your own Scenario.]

[Bullshit corner: Soloing her with W Corp. Ryoshu was the most painful thing I'd ever done in my entire brief yet agonizing existence.]
